name: One-Hit Kill
desc: Every strike deletes whatever it touches.

name: Infinite Embers
desc: Keeps your ember count topped at 999.

name: Max Vesper Souls
desc: Grants 9999 vesper souls, unlocking every soul tier.

name: All Cosmetics Unlocked
desc: Every cloak, glow, accessory, and trail is yours.

name: Iron Hide
desc: Doubles max HP and heals to full.

name: Beam Always Ready
desc: Keeps HP topped so the beam is always charged.

name: Panic Button (K)
desc: Press K to clear every enemy in the room.

name: Skip Cutscenes (N)
desc: Press N to skip the current scene or dialog.

name: Room Warp Menu (M)
desc: Press M for a quick teleport list to any room.
